spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 2 of 2 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Adds an invalid-value fallback probe for video and audio; Chrome DevTools verified the estimator treats unsupported loading values as eager.

references.rationale: Cites the corrected chromestatus.com/feature/5200068565139456 reference link and the HTML media loading attribute section.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Chrome DevTools verification exercised the estimator controls, confirmed all form controls are labelled, and verified invalid-value fallback with no remaining critique questions.
